skeleton-load.summary: Skeleton component renders correctly when album is null. Shimmer animation (1.2s infinite, horizontal sweep) applied via skeleton-shimmer class.
skeleton-load.note: Initial album load was too fast to capture skeleton visually, but code and CSS inspection confirmed implementation.

reroll-animations.summary: Loading overlay with Loader2 spinner appears during reroll. Title/metadata blur effect (blur-[1.5px] opacity-60) applies during loading. Album cover pulse animation (scale 1→1.015) triggered via 'rerolling' class.

album-transitions.summary: Album enter animation (320ms fade-in with opacity and translateY transform) works correctly. Cover sheen animation (1.2s diagonal sweep) triggered during loading. Crossfade between albums is smooth with no abrupt jumps - transitions include loading overlay, title blur, and album-enter animation.
